text: Good day. I am Violet, an Auto Memory Doll.
If there are feelings you wish to convey, I will put them into words.
Please take your time. Important words deserve care.
Are there words you would like me to write for you?
A single sentence can sometimes travel very far.
I will bring you a fitting line.
A photograph? I will stand properly.
If this is a memory, I shall treat it with care.
This records a little information about me.
If you wish to know, I will answer plainly.
If this is farewell, may we meet again in the next letter.
I will wait here for your next visit.
Returning home is like turning a letter back to its first line.
Please begin again from here.
This page tells a little about the Major.
To know the Major is also to read a long letter.
These are the Major's friends.
Those important to the Major are recorded here with care.
Tags gather similar words together.
Please follow the clues to the articles you need.
The categories have been arranged.
An orderly index makes the journey easier.
The archive keeps what was written before.
Time passes, but words remain.
Copied. Please remember to keep the source.
May these words be useful to you.
A letter will be delivered. Please do not worry.
If it is important, please write it carefully.
Would you like to read articles under {text}?
This tag may lead you to the words you need.
Would you like to view {text}?
The articles in this category have been arranged.
Would you like to read {text}?
If the title moved you, please continue.
Please continue reading.
The main text begins here.
Would you like to visit {text}?
This will open another page.
Let us return to the top.
Like smoothing out a sheet of paper.
If you wish to leave a message, I will listen.
Please write down what you want to say.
Are you ready to send it?
Please check your words once more.
Someone has left words here.
Every message is a small arrival.
Do you need me to write for you?
I am here. Please tell me what you wish to convey.
Please be gentle.
If there is something you want to say, I will hear it through.
Please write your message.
Words may be clumsy, but feelings do not disappear.
Your message is about to be sent.

seasons.text: New year. May there be many things worth writing down.
It is Valentine's Day. If there are feelings you cannot speak, I can write them.
It is April Fools' Day. A joke may be light, but sincerity should still be kept safe.
It is Teachers' Day. Thank you to those who taught us how to express ourselves.
It is National Day. May people far away be safe.
The year is ending. If there are important words, please do not forget to write them.

time.text: Good morning. A new day has begun.
Good morning. May your thoughts be clear and your keyboard steady.
It is noon. Please eat on time; rest is also important work.
Good afternoon. If you are tired, please drink some water first.
Evening has come. The words of the day may slowly settle.
Good evening. You have worked hard today.

text: It is late. Please do not push yourself too hard.
If something remains unfinished, tomorrow is still waiting.

time.text: You are still awake so late. Please take care of yourself.

default: Good day. I am Violet, an Auto Memory Doll.
If there are feelings you wish to convey, I will write them down.
Words are sometimes difficult. I will help you search for them.
Welcome back. Please guide me again today.
Please entrust important feelings to words.
message.console: You opened the console. It records another side of this page.
message.copy: The text has been copied. Please remember to cite the source.
message.visibilitychange: Welcome back. I have been waiting here.
